description: Derive (thumbKey, previewKey, fullKey, contentKey) from a 32-byte epoch seed. Locks the TS-shipped BLAKE2b-keyed derivation; Rust diverges (HKDF-SHA256). Discriminators are SHA-256 over the derived key bytes so the secret keys themselves do not appear in the corpus.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: epochSeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Epoch seed must never leave the client (delivered via sealed bundle only).

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: thumbKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Tier keys are derived client-side and never uploaded.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: previewKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Tier keys are derived client-side and never uploaded.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: fullKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Tier keys are derived client-side and never uploaded.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: contentKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Album content key is derived client-side and never uploaded.
